languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

languages.text: "Столь резкий переход к полемике, генетор, свидетельствует об обуявшем вас бесстрашии. Желаете совет? Отриньте это чувство. Методы Священных Ордосов являются весьма неудачной темой для диспута".

"Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

"Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

languages.text: «Genetor, al meterse en polémica demuestra usted la valentía que se ha apoderado de su ser. ¿Me permite un consejo? Recupere ese miedo. Los métodos de los Santos Ordos no son un tema que convenga debatir».
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

traits.locale_text: «Genetor, al meterse en polémica demuestra usted la valentía que se ha apoderado de su ser. ¿Me permite un consejo? Recupere ese miedo. Los métodos de los Santos Ordos no son un tema que convenga debatir».

languages.text: 「論争に踏み込むとは、ゲネター、あなたを捉えた恐れ知らずの証だな。一つ助言を許してもらえるか？ 恐れを取り戻すことだ。聖なるオルドスの手法は、議論の主題としてはなはだ不適切なものだ」
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

traits.locale_text: 「論争に踏み込むとは、ゲネター、あなたを捉えた恐れ知らずの証だな。一つ助言を許してもらえるか？ 恐れを取り戻すことだ。聖なるオルドスの手法は、議論の主題としてはなはだ不適切なものだ」

languages.text: “基因士，执着于争辩，是一种被无畏所支配的证明。我能给一个建议吗？找回你的恐惧。审判庭的手段可不是什么适合辩论的主题。”
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

traits.locale_text: “基因士，执着于争辩，是一种被无畏所支配的证明。我能给一个建议吗？找回你的恐惧。审判庭的手段可不是什么适合辩论的主题。”

languages.text: "Eure Polemik, werter Genetor, belegt die Furchtlosigkeit, die Euch ereilt hat. Darf ich Euch einen Rat geben? Findet Eure Angst wieder. Die Methoden der Heilige Ordos sind ein höchst unerfreuliches Gesprächsthema."
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Polemik, werter Genetor, belegt die Furchtlosigkeit, die Euch ereilt hat. Darf ich Euch einen Rat geben? Findet Eure Angst wieder. Die Methoden der Heilige Ordos sind ein höchst unerfreuliches Gesprächsthema."

languages.text: « Votre goût pour la polémique, genetor, est une preuve de votre nouvelle audace. Puis-je me permettre un conseil ? Familiarisez-vous de nouveau avec la peur. Les méthodes du Saint Ordo sont un choix malheureux pour un débat. »
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."

traits.locale_text: « Votre goût pour la polémique, genetor, est une preuve de votre nouvelle audace. Puis-je me permettre un conseil ? Familiarisez-vous de nouveau avec la peur. Les méthodes du Saint Ordo sont un choix malheureux pour un débat. »

languages.text: "Polemiğe sapmak, sizi ele geçiren korkusuzluğun kanıtıdır Genetör. Bir tavsiye verebilir miyim? Korkunuzu yeniden keşfedin. Kutsal Nizam'ın yöntemleri, tartışılması çok talihsiz bir konudur."
languages.original_text: "Veering into polemics, Genetor, is evidence of the fearlessness that has overtaken you. May I offer some advice? Rediscover your fear. The methods of the Holy Ordos is a very unfortunate subject for debate."
